overview.value: Founded in 2012, Space Capital is a venture capital firm investing at the intersection of space technology and global markets, with over 1 billion dollars in assets under management across four institutional funds. The firm traces its origins to Space Angels, founded in 2007, and rebranded to Space Capital in 2020. It concentrates on three areas spanning infrastructure to distribution to applications: GPS, Geospatial Intelligence, and Satellite Communications.

focus.value: Space Capital is a venture capital firm with over $1 billion AUM investing at the intersection of space technology and global markets.

events.headline: Space Capital's predecessor, Space Angels, is founded
Space Capital founded in New York City
Space Angels rebrands as Space Capital
Space Capital launches its fourth fund, Space Capital IV
